017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
020
021import java.security.*;
022import java.util.*;
023
024/**
025 * Mutable helper that folds a sequence of {@link AuthResult}s into a single result, honoring
026 * {@link AuthResult.MergeMode}.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * {@link AuthResult.MergeMode#ADD ADD} unions roles and keeps the first non-<jk>null</jk> principal;
030 * {@link AuthResult.MergeMode#REPLACE REPLACE} resets the accumulated principal + roles.  Used by both
031 * {@link AuthFilterChain} and the resource-level fold in {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestContext}.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AuthResult}
035 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AuthFilterChain}
036 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerAuthenticator">REST Authenticator</a>
037 * </ul>
038 *
039 * @since 10.0.0
040 */
041public final class AuthResultAccumulator {
042
043   private Principal principal;
044   private final Set<String> roles = new LinkedHashSet<>();
045   private boolean any;
046
047   /**
048    * Folds the next result into this accumulator.
049    *
050    * @param r The result to fold in. <jk>null</jk> is ignored.
051    * @return This object.
052    */
053   public AuthResultAccumulator add(AuthResult r) {
054      if (r == null)
055         return this;
056      any = true;
057      if (r.getMode() == AuthResult.MergeMode.REPLACE) {
058         principal = r.getPrincipal();
059         roles.clear();
060         roles.addAll(r.getRoles());
061      } else {
062         if (principal == null)
063            principal = r.getPrincipal();  // may still be null (roles-only)
064         roles.addAll(r.getRoles());
065      }
066      return this;
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Returns the folded result.
071    *
072    * @return The folded result, or {@link Optional#empty()} if nothing was added or no principal was ever resolved.
073    */
074   public Optional<AuthResult> result() {
075      if (! any || principal == null)
076         return opte();
077      return opt(AuthResult.of(principal, roles));
078   }
079}
